title: cassia oligoclada var. goniodes
intro: Cassia oligoclada var. goniodes, commonly known as the golden shower tree, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Cassia oligoclada var. goniodes include its potential to treat digestive disorders, manage fever, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or dried powder, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to prepare various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tablets.
